items.title: Malaysia Makes Deal With China To Stabilise Medical Devices’ Supply
items.summary: Malaysia's MDA has reached an agreement with China to increase resin and naphtha supplies for the manufacture of medical devices in Malaysia, says MOH in admitting the "direct impact" of the global energy crisis on availability of critical medical devices. The post Malaysia Makes Deal With China To Stabilise Medical Devices’ Supply appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: UMMC Denies Radiation Exposure Caused Staff Cancer ‘Cluster’
items.summary: UMMC denies claims that radiation safety violations caused a cancer "cluster" in its radiology department. Three staff were diagnosed with cancer, four with thyroid diseases. The hospital says staff radiation exposure levels were below prescribed limits. The post UMMC Denies Radiation Exposure Caused Staff Cancer ‘Cluster’ appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Moving Beyond Headlines: Strengthening Malaysia’s Health Care System Through Collaboration — Prof Dr M. Murallitharan
items.summary: This is not the first time I highlighted a problem that no one wants to look at or even consider; nor will it be the last. I am quite used to being the unwanted or unlooked-for messenger. The post Moving Beyond Headlines: Strengthening Malaysia’s Health Care System Through Collaboration — Prof Dr M. Murallitharan appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Distrust Is A Symptom, Not The Disease In Malaysia’s Health Care Crisis — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam, Dr Ahmad Faizal Mohd Perdaus & Dr Sng Kim Hock
items.summary: We call on all stakeholders to move the debate away from emotional accusations of bad faith and toward the unglamorous, difficult work of price regulation. Stop blaming doctors for the medical inflation they did not create. The post Distrust Is A Symptom, Not The Disease In Malaysia’s Health Care Crisis — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin, Dr Rajeentheran Suntheralingam, Dr Ahmad Faizal Mohd Perdaus & Dr Sng Kim Hock appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The State Legislative Assembly Isn’t A House To Recite Statistics, But To Solve Problems — Perak Doctor
items.summary: A state legislative assembly is where elected reps are meant to translate numbers into policy. Health care manpower is heavily shaped by federal policy, but this doesn't absolve state govts of responsibility. Perak should learn from Johor, Sabah, Sarawak. The post The State Legislative Assembly Isn’t A House To Recite Statistics, But To Solve Problems — Perak Doctor appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Making An Informed Decision: MAID 2026 Empowers Aspiring Medical Students Across Malaysia
items.summary: What began as a student-led initiative has since evolved into a nationally recognised platform, empowering aspiring medical students across Malaysia to make informed decisions about pursuing a career in medicine. The post Making An Informed Decision: MAID 2026 Empowers Aspiring Medical Students Across Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: The Business Of Growing Old In Malaysia
items.summary: As Malaysia grows older, the challenge is not only to care for older citizens, but also to ensure that the emerging economy of ageing remains anchored in dignity, protection, and shared prosperity. The post The Business Of Growing Old In Malaysia appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: NKF: Reduce Dialysis Frequency If Shortages Grow Acute
items.summary: To address a shortage of dialysis products, NKF moots reducing dialysis frequency. Maaedicare and Socso are monitoring stock levels. A nephrologist urges MOH to form a nephrology task force and activate a central command structure to control distribution. The post NKF: Reduce Dialysis Frequency If Shortages Grow Acute appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: RM100 Allowance For Nurses For 17 Years: A Test Of National Leadership — MMA
items.summary: MMA calls for an immediate decision to increase the post-basic nursing allowance to a minimum of RM500 per month. The post RM100 Allowance For Nurses For 17 Years: A Test Of National Leadership — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Ensuring Sustainability And Equity In Malaysia’s Dental Health Care System — MPDPA
items.summary: Malaysians must continue to receive safe, accessible and high-quality dental care, within a system that is sustainable and equitable for all. The post Ensuring Sustainability And Equity In Malaysia’s Dental Health Care System — MPDPA appeared first on CodeBlue .
